_comment: Cross-host repo inventory for the weekly deep audit sweep (obsidian-vaults#167 Layer 3). Install to ~/.config/qute/audit-inventory.json. repo_inventory.py reads `hosts`/`max_depth`; deep_sweep.py additionally reads `priority` (live-capital repos swept FIRST). A host with an `ssh` target is enumerated remotely and graceful-degrades if unreachable.
